case_title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. DEAN BAKER et al

docket_entries.description: MINUTES FOR JAN-28-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 624
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAKER, DEAN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER JUDITH OSSA. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-28-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 624. CASE SETTLED, SENT TO PLACE TERMS ON THE RECORD.
